title: Nightdweller
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|night}}
A '''nightdweller''' was a creature<ref name="AI">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. They preyed upon [[Kashyyyk bantha]]s.<ref name="G4">{{GamerCite|4|Secrets of Kashyyyk}}</ref>

[[Tirranna]] considered the [[Venithon Twins]] escaped from her "like a [[scur]] from the jaws of a nightdweller."<ref name="AI" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
*<!-- 2001-06-19 -->{{GamerCite|4|Secrets of Kashyyyk}}
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
